name: Busy Day Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, add oil and onion. Saute until tender.
2. Add ground beef. Stir to brown.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Add mushrooms, corn, and tomato soup. Mix well.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cook noodles in salted water; drain.
7. Combine noodles, meat mixture, and half the cheese in a 2-quart casserole.
8. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
